All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Animals
This class represents the toy type animals and extends from the general toy class.
AnimalsTest
 
AppDriver
This main method initializes the store.
AppMenu
This class displays the app menu.
BoardGames
This class represents the toy type board games and extends from the toy class.
BoardGamesTest
 
CustomException
This class extends from exception to return custom throw messages.
Figures
This class represents the toy type figures and extends from the toy class.
FiguresTest
 
Puzzles
This class represents the toy type puzzle and extends from the general toy class.
PuzzlesTest
 
StoreManager
This class represents the coordination of the view and model classes to create a functional store.
Toy
This class represents the general attributes each toy has in the database.
